title: Heart Indicator
description: Lightweight mod that shows player health as hearts above their head
body:
## Heart Indicator – Health Above Players!

**Heart Indicator** is a simple and lightweight Minecraft mod that shows player health as hearts above their head, clean, clear, and useful for PvP or SMP gameplay.

To toggle heart indicator on and off, you have to set keybind from game controls, by default the heart indicator is turned on!

![Screenshot from Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e24b8318ceb0bf982917da3467f35751ee6ad858.png)

### ✨ Features

* Real-time health display above players
* Adjustable height (Up & Down Arrow keys)
* Toggle overlay on/off anytime
* Reset option included

Perfect for PvP, Lifesteal, SMP, and content creators who want better health visibility without cluttering the screen.

[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e81436885d7d199d80ffde632b0895d24a2c72b.png)](https://fastclient.net/spunky)
